reviews.review_text: Fantastic stay in a dog cabin. Look it's clean, close to the beaches, close to Coolangatta  close to Kingscliff and other holiday towns. Just perfect. The staff are amazing there is a pool and also top caravan sites and other luxury cabins. We just wanted to be able to bring along our dog and the cabin suited us. Self contained with our own ensuite. Amazing stay highly recommend.
Very convenient location and very clean ammenities and camp kitchen

Enjoy my night at the budget cabin. No. 49 was great was the external ensuite was just at the front door. Bed was super comfortable. It was spacious enough for me and my 2 teenage boys. The boys slept well on the bunk bed. Definitely will book again when the boys have a bowling tournament at Tweed heads. It's a 7 min drive..
Staff was friendly when it came to the booking process. Book via the phone for best price deal. Easy safe box check-in if you can't make it when the office is open.
Highly recommended

Cabin infested with ants and cock roaches. Underneath beds hadn't been cleaned in yrs. Windows dont lock sliding  doors dont slide. Every bed has bed bugs kids covered in bites. Stay away

Replying to ur msg yes we stayed under my wife's booking last week in cabin 48 maybe go have a look under the beds and check ur mattresses for bed bugs

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We are having our very first caravan holiday at Pyramid Holiday Park and couldn’t be happier! We are staying at one of the pet-friendly ensuite sites, which was incredibly convenient and made traveling with our two cavoodles an absolute breeze.

The park itself is spotless—everything from the amenities to the grounds is so well maintained. Communication with the team was excellent from start to finish, making the whole experience smooth and stress-free.

We are having such a fantastic time that we’ve already booked two more stays for 2026! Thank you to the wonderful team at Pyramid Holiday Park for making our holiday so memorable. We can’t wait to come back!
Karen B
Everything was spot on. The whole park is well maintained. The staff is fantastic. I would stay here again.
under the airport flight path. luckily it is not 24/7. check times to see if you are happy with this.park is close to shops, 10 min walk, which is great. close to tweed facilities if you are driving.
Stayed last weekend. Fabulous cabin, exceptionally clean, friendly staff. No 1 can control weather or planes..Ice cubes in freezer ( yay) Local traders very friendly. G8 base to go out exploring.

Absolutely a horrible experience. My daughter was bitten while sleeping. We requested a refund as we were meant to stay another night, but the management refused. The lounge was broken. When talking to the manager she walked off on me. They did offer us another room, but we refused as we thought this could happen again and the mattress protector had urine stain on it. Management did give us a refund for laundry cost of clothes and the pharmacy cost. Very noisy with planes going over.
Great stay! We stayed in the 2 bedroom villa, after hours check in was so easy! Will stay there back!
Lovely facilities, clean and neat. Planes are noisy but location is great.
Comfort clean rooms, just a bit noisy with the planes until curfew occurred.
I was disappointed that 2 meals that I had in the camp kitchen fridge were stolen and left me without dinner for that night. Other than that the holiday park was great.

Site was good, plenty of room. Nicely grassed around and cement. Issue with bin chickens strolling through and pooping under the awning.
The biggest issue is the being under the flightpath of the airport. Noise was extreme during particularly early morning and mid to late afternoon. Notably there is no information about this prior to booking and once checked in and paid, no refund under any circumstances. This is unethical imho as anyone with noise sensitivity will not cope (autism spectrum etc).
Very much a resident park though residents around is were nice.
Staff were nice.

Close to Airport
Very loud due to flight operation between 7 am to 11 pm
Great friendly staff and prompt helpful service, great location.

We camped on an ensuite site, good size, clean. Amenities block were clean, good kitchen area. Kids loved the pool, lots of dogs all on leads. We would stay again. Only down side was the planes but they were few and far between
Basically it was good we unhappy about Washroom in outside the Accommodation.
Awesome cabins great service from staff
Very friendly staff and nothing was an issue.  Quiet site with clean ammenities.  Pool table comes in handy with teenagers.  Quick Uber ride to Cooly...perfect.

Very clean and well maintained. Just disappointed there was no guest WiFi. The park is in the flight path of Coolangatta airport, but was tolerable as it had cut off and commencement flights from 7.00am - 10.00pm.
Was very clean and felt comfortable.  We were overnight heading to the Airport very early morning. Great location.
Compact unit #49 with ensuite was perfect for our overnight stay prior to flying home from Gold Coast airport.  Clean & comfortable.  Loved the manicured gardens too.  Would definitely stay again.

Staff were super friendly and efficient, very happy with our stay and also storage for our caravan long term. Very obliging staff with a friendly approach.
Julie
Directly under flight path taking off planes

This is a lovely clean camp. Has lots of facilities.
I stayed in a villa. It was extremely clean. The air-conditioning was fantastic as were the fans. Kept the whole villa cool.
It was interesting to have the constant  planes fly over and be able to nearly count the rivets that hold then together, being so low.
It was a fun place to stay.

Lovely villa to spend a few days with family.
Check in was so easy.
Park was spotless
Lovely neat park . Reception is very friendly and welcoming
Very easily accessible and numerous varieties of accommodation available

Well located, cabins were spotlessly clean. Staff were very friendly and obliging. If you are seeking cost efficient clean comfortable
Accomodation, look no further. Thanks team Pyramid, we will certainly return.
Still coming back, we're happy with our stay.

The staff are absolutely wonderful and go above and beyond! The deluxe cabin was so beautiful appointed, modern, super clean, everything carefully thought out. The pool and bird feeding were a highlight for the children, hospital was only 10 min drive for us, for our appointment. We will definitely be back!
Very nice place. Airport is a bit close and noisy.

Outstanding 2 bedroom cabin in a quiet park. Bright room, lovely bathroom, well equipped kitchen, and super quiet at night. Small details like lovely bedside lamps. Staff were super helpful ahead of the booking.

Due to a problem with my car I needed to extend my stay a few times. The management bent over backwards for myself & my sister. Accommodations are spotless & the park is well maintained. Location is handy to Tweed. People are friendly & helpful. There is a bit of aircraft noise but there’s a curfew so we sleep well. Very good & would stay here again.
We have stayed a few times now and I cannot recommend it enough. It’s friendly and clean. Extremely quiet in the evenings. The locals are all nice. Loved it

2night stay at caravan ensuite site. Ensuite was dated but clean & serviceable. There is quite a few permanent vans but the park was well maintained. It is in a flight path, but we didn't find the planes an issue & there was no noise during the night. Walking distance to an IGA, chemist & other small shops & takeaways. Very convenient for our stay & would definitely stay here again.
It was a very comfortable stay.
Great location and quick access to the beach and township
Friendly staff. I love watching the planes coming in and out.

We only stayed for 2 nights but we enjoyed our stay . The beds were very comfortable . Separate toilet and shower . We had a full size fridge , microwave, gas hot plates . lounge ,  kitchen table and chairs .
We didn’t have time to swim in the pool but it looked very nice .
Parking was a bit tight next to our villa but I hopped  out when hubby parked the car and waited till he reversed car out to hop in .
The sound of the birds in the morning was lovely . Easy to get to places .
Yes we did hear the planes but in saying that it wasn’t too bad . Good alarm clock in the morning and stopped by 10.00pm .
Staff were lovely and very helpful.
We stayed in Deluxe Villa 2 .
Great site, quiet park. Friendly staff and full time residents
Nice and quiet

Live it, Love it,
you've just got to try it.
Very clean
I thoroughly enjoyed my stay with Pyrmaid holiday park! The service is worth mentioning as the staff were unbelievably accommodating. Definitely recommend !
Great location, fantastic staff. Highly recommend powered ensuite suites. We will be back !
This is our second year staying here. We love it so much we won’t stay anywhere else.
Great park. Lovely staff. Sad that play area gone

Stayed for 4 nights over the Christmas break. Powered Ensuite site, family of 3 with a 2.5yr old.
Upon arrival, we noticed the roads were a little narrow but we managed to park our van well on the allocated site.
The ensuite was a little dated but it serviced our needs.
We were excited to look at the activities the park had but were a little disappointed. There was an outdoor pool and a recreational room which held books, DVDs and a pool table as well as a couch and tv. We searched the park for a playground for my daughter but there wasn't one. This was probably one of the most upsetting things about our stay as there wasn't really anything for our daughter to do. The park unfortunately lacked family spirit for us. We figured that on the large grass area to the rear of the park was a great space to play kick to kick with our daughter. However, there were signs stating no ball activities were allowed which then further restricted what we were able to do as a family. I believe this is due to the permanent residents occupying 80 percent of the grounds. We never felt like we wanted to sit outside of our van as there was nothing for us to look at or do (other than permanent residents), no families walking around, no one using the pool. It was more of a park that was home to many permanent residents. Many permanent residents were quite untidy which gave off an unclean feeling. On one occasion we noticed two police vehicles exiting the park as we were arriving one afternoon which concerned us a little.
Maintenance, office staff and ground keepers were lovely, often waving hello.
It's also probably worth mentioning that the washing machines and dryers are quite expensive. $6 per load of washing and another $6 if you require a dryer (which we did as it was raining during our stay).
Overall, it was a quiet stay but I wouldn't be rushing back unfortunately which is a shame as it's close to airports and the gold coast.
Very tight narrow roads so difficult to back van into location
Very nice people 👍 👌

We had a quick trip down and needed a overnight place to rest up and we found this place. The staff are lovely and we got a budget family cabin. The room was a good size for the 5 of us. The kids enjoyed the pool and the games room has plenty of entertainment to help keep them busy. Some things are a little dated but for a family tourist park we had everything we needed. Yes the airport is close and you can hear some of the planes going over but they didn't bother us at all and they didn't go through the night.
2 bedroom deluxe villa clean and spacious, close to pool, unfortunately I had a medical episode and the staff couldn't be more caring and helpful. Thank you was much appreciated

Fantastic service. Kind & friendly office staff. Maintenance men got my son & I roadworthy again. So grateful. Love the planes & feeding the lorrikets. Great pool. This was our 2nd stay. Would easily stay again. Very convenient location. Thank you. ❤️ 🙏
Caretakers were amazing, very helpful

We didn't have a room. Our caravan site was a good size with an unsuited. The management were onto everything. The park and pool was spotless and all the staff are very friendly. Yes there are a lot of plains that go over but to be honest, we love them. They stop at a decent hour and start again at a decent hour. Easy access to everything. IGA, bottle shop, chemist, and a few variety shops 2 minutes down the road and 8 minutes to the bigger shops. Great value for money. Only downside is residents leaving their washing on the line and using it as their private wardrobe lol We will definitely be staying again.
Thank you for an amazing stay we appreciate all your accommodation and kindness

Was a great stay over all lovely staff makes it feel like home cabin bit small if it a family with little one had no room to move around once my small play pen was set up had to reorganise the place to get around but there are bigger cabin that’s are bigger and beautiful as I had family stay in them beautiful place to bring the family and dogs but would recommend giving another key for the Aircon because it’s silly how you take the Aircon key out to your cabin and then your cabin gets hot time you get back I’m having heat temp issues take while cool down while the little ones are to hot and being sick but besides that the family loved it
Only stayed 2 nights, room and outside ensuite were clean and comfortable. Staff were friendly and helpful.
Loved our stay. We’d definitely book again!

Great accommodation clean  well appointed units.
Staff friendly nothing a problem highly reccommend the Pyramid Holiday Park always stay there
great park , we are staying for 6 months with our dog . great staff clean park . Its under direct flight path for airport ,planes stop around 11 pm . I hardly even notice now .
Excellent Service great units extremely clean. Great little park. Pool is fabulous spot in a nice area with bbq and sun chairs. Highly recommend.
Great place to stay for a couple of days after a busy time in Ballina and Gold coast

Just needed a cheap cabin for an arvo rest and refresh for a long workday night. Self Checkin after hours perfectly easy.
Inside was sufficiently clean and comfortable. Aircon worked. Hot shower in separate detached (but private) bathroom was great.
The park is in the flight path for the Gold Coast Airport, so large jets were landing low and frequently, between 5:30pm and 9:30pm.
Great upgrade .very appreciated. Im staying for another 3 Wednesdays and would love it every time x
Good place to stay, clean and comfortable. The airport noise was unexpected but got used to that quickly.
Staff were very friendly and helpful when booking. We needed additional parking and this was no problem for them to accommodate this.
Staff were fantastic on check in. Nice, super clean, modern cabin. Well priced and suited our needs for the night. Knowing they are dog friendly means we will be back with the pooches.

Was cheap enough, staff friendly
Room could do with a good mop, feet were filthy after walking around for 10 mins bare foot.
Park seems like it is more for permanent residents rather than family on holiday
Planes are loud when flying over but to be expected due to location

The villa had some cockroaches some small some large. 2 large in my bed & on my pillow. The outside bathroom had a palm tree growing across the walkway which made it difficult to walk the path with a walking stick. The internal sliding door was very difficult to open & close ( off the runner). The curtains needed to be wider & less light to come through. The park is directly under the flight path so expect limited sleep. .

I will make it clear that my booking said non refundable. I asked for a refund due to our whole family falling ill and we needed to stay in the current hotel and not infect anyone. I thought there could be an exception made here for a refund due to this kind of reason but nope they stood firm and did not want to issue a refund. They don’t have to but a bit of courtesy would have been nice. I’ve had other parks understand and issue refunds that say non refundable because they have a bit of heart.

This park is a lovely old fashion park, lots of permanent residents! The owners and staff are lovely! The park is located under the flight path of the airport which can be noisy but also fascinating! Most sites have ensuite which was awesome, they are older style which suits me. They have a few pet friendly sites and a dog area! You are only allowed to walk your pet along two short street but with the off lead area it’s fine! They feed the bird each morning which is lovely! There is a lovely pool area!
We found there was plenty of spots to explore! Plenty of lovely eateries too!

This does appear to be a park more for permanent residents than holiday makers - which was fine.  Basically I was looking for a base to explore the region but was only able to get one night as they were full.
It is very close to the airport and the low flying planes were quite disconcerting - but thankfully no night flyovers.
My one complaint was that the site I was on had just been vacated by a large bus that had obviously been there a while and it hadn’t been mowed or cleaned when I arrived (in a small campervan). A staff member walked by and apologised and said they would come to mow the grass.  I said it was not bothering me and it was fine how it was.  However later that afternoon while I was relaxing in the shade while my dog was sleeping they returned with mower and whipper snipper.  So my peace was disturbed, dust flying everywhere and me very concerned a rock was going to hit my vehicle.  They were friendly and apologetic - but seriously I was only there for one night and I couldn’t see why they didn’t just wait until I left the next day.  They weren’t cleaning the site for my benefit that’s for sure!
Quite early the next morning the whipper snippers were back mowing nearby and close to my site again.  While I know they need to get the work done I think doing this after 10am checkout would be more appropriate!
I guess I wouldn’t recommend this park for a relaxing holiday, more if a stopover or base.

Very comfortable, super clean,
Quite,  just perfect!
Good kidless park…great adult park
Very clean, well appointed, a very good nights sleep, highly recommend.

I found both the office staff and the maintenance staff very professional, courteous and accommodating, the facilities were excellent and the park is reasonably priced while being close to all your holiday needs.
Timothy Freeland

We did enjoy staying here price is good  location was good only things we did not like about this place was the outdoor bathroom  second thing the was construction 🦺 was going they SMS me on day3 and apologise about the noise other then that nice stuff very friendly thank you 🙏

Luxury 2 Bedroom Villa. Nice accommodation for a family of 4. Lack of Wardrobe space in second bedroom might make an extended stay a little problematic. Room facilities were modern and clean. Close to pool and having inside Shower and WC was welcomed.

Flight path Inbound to Coolangatta Airport was noticeable as it flew directly over our Villa. This stops around 11.00pm Qld time.

All up an enjoyable place to stay.

Lovely helpful staff, tidy grounds and pool area, dated but very tidy ensuite area, fairly tight site for large caravans.  We needed a place to camp for two nights and I knew before going that the park was under the flight path and next to a busy road.  These factors do unfortunately detract from the overall feel of what is a lovely budget priced (for GC) caravan park that is convenient to Coolangatta and the Tweed Coast.  We would short stay again.
Very clean. Lots of planes

Our stay at Pyramid Holiday Park was interesting. Being so close to an airport you could obviously hear the planes ... coming from a very quiet location it took a little adjusting to. On the positive, they did stop at 10pm and started at 6am.                               We stayed in a pet friendly cabin with our 2 2 year old pups. Some things were a little run down ... the roller door was a bit bumpty bump and the condition of the ceiling and walls was a little sad ... but nothing that affected our stay and being able to have our pups stay with us is a big bonus!!                                                          The microwave could come with some instructions, took a little while to guess how it worked. But that could be just us.                    The staff were really polite, helpful and genuinely lovely people.                                             The Park is located near food, fuel, fun, water and not too far from the good old theme parks.                                                               Thank You For Having Us 💐
Had a ensuite powered site. Very clean ensuite. Not a great location if you don’t have a vehicle. Beautiful grounds at the park and lovely staff.

A reasonably good sized space for four.|Noisy from from nearby airport planes. Stark bright lighting and no bedside lights. The pillowtop matresses were so hot from underneath you were constantly overheating.
Collette and Steve were fantastic hosts. Thanks for accomodating everyone this long weekend. We appreciated everything you did for us.

Stayed in a beautiful 2 bedroom cabin. Bed was very comfortable.
The staff were amazing.
My stay here was very comfortable & clean, no hassles easy to move around the park.
Very clean rooms and grounds, friendly helpful staff. Quiet in the park, only noise  low flying planes. We enjoyed our stay.
Friendly staff park is clean

We had a great stay. Collette and team were very accommodating as we came and went before and after our hike. We stayed in a deluxe cabin and a bungalow and both were more than comfortable. The washing machines, pool and games were all in excellent condition. The planes were a novelty and didn't bother me.

the cabin we stayed in was lovely, clean and comfortable.  the bed was just right and the bedding soft and plentiful.  there was good water pressure for a pleasant shower.  the only drawback was being in the flight path for the nearby Gold Coast airport but, since that closes overnight, this wasn't really an issue.  convenient for the Tweed Heads area including the Twin Towns Services Club and a short drive to the Gold Coast or Byron Bay.

Jo and Phil were so helpful and friendly,  made us feel very welcome.
Cabins are bright, airy and clean.

We are caravanners -  self-accommadating
The convenient location is our main prority
The management and staff are excellent
The rates are very reasonable for us
We are always satisfied with our stay at Pyramid
Peaceful and quiet, close to beautiful beaches, and conveniently located to all shops and public transport, best park in southern GC/northern nsw

When get budget cabins   get what you pay for  . No extra toilet paper unless buy it from reception  , even asking for towels  they ask what day you check in  . Cabins are pretty good  with no internet   also flight path for airport  with planes being  that low can read the writing on them easily  , big and small .
Pleasant 6 night stay with our small pop up camper.  Our own ablution block was excellent.  Would recommend to others.

Where is it Google?
Give me a hint! When you're travelling, and Google sends you a totally random name, with no indication of where it is?

I would never use them again unless I was absolutely desperate.
The toilet and shower outside of the unit. No Wi-Fi and Less you go to the reception area. You cannot contact them before 9:00 a.m. in the morning and they close at 4:00 p.m. in the afternoon. Is it is very near an airport planes or constantly flying extremely low making one hell of a noise.

We had a very nice villa at Pyramid holiday park for 3 nights before flying out to Melbourne. The location was excellent,as we were not very far from the coolangatta airport. Our daughter picked us up & transfered in around 5 minutes to the airport. We couldn't fault the Villa as my wife was using her hand trolley & could easily go up the outside ramp. We needed to show a couple of items in the Villa, & Steve was onto it very quickly. In all, it was a good experience for us. Sincerely Bernard Jeffares.
Lovely new clean cabins and very helpful staff. Location poor under flight path and on busy road with no close restaurants.

We had a budget cabin. It was well set up & had everything we needed.
I found the bed too firm but if you like firm beds, you're set.

Great park ,  we had a caravan site, everyone very friendly and park well looked after . Dog exercise area was a great bonus .
A very nice caravan park ,would definitely stay again ,Sue and BarryTurner and Millie the golden retriever

The only real down side that unfortunately the owners/park can not do anything about unless the bribe the people in charge flight paths is it’s perfectly inline with the airports flight path. So it does get noisy++ at times. Otherwise staff are friendly the facilities are good well located and priced competitively.

Lovely stay at Pyramid Holiday Park, it had everything we needed, close to shopping centre. It is kept clean and tidy. Staff was friendly and were accomodating.
The only thing that we didn't like was the planes flying above early in the morning.

Great, tidy park with good facilities. I stayed in one of powered sites which are conveniently located close to the amenities and camp kitchen. All amenities/kitchen/laundry are cleaned regularly.
There is also a very comfy rec/games room with cosy couches, library, tv and tea and coffee making facilities should you need respite from inclement weather or just a nice place to retreat.
Gorgeous swimming pool and swimming pool area with deck chairs, umbrellas and change rooms.
Welcoming and friendly staff who are super helpful and kind
The park, as with much accommodation in the area, is under the flight path which is a consideration if you're noise sensitive however I found in Tweed Heads most places are in proximity to the airport or the motorway anyway.
Would definitely stay again.
We loved it here. Besides the constant smell of cigarette smoke and someone with there TV up loud. We absolutely love the place.
Caravan sites laud our well and amenities were great Lovely feel about this park Everything was great
Very clean ensuite bathroom for caravan sites.
The  serice is exccellent and the ensuite was clean and in good order however the parkiing to site is a bit tight.

We had a site at Pyramid Van Park for more than 2 weeks. Our site had an old but clean ensuite. The park gardens, roads and waste management are very well kept and clean and tidy. The pool looks great and the Recreation Room great on a wet day. The noise of the planes overhead did not worry us. This is our second stay at Pyramid and we will return.
Not a nice place ,very expensive for what you get NOTHING. Its for a permanent caravan  park accommodation not for weekend away.

Room/unit very well equipped but lacked hocks/hangers in bathroom for clothes/towels.  Towel rack only piece of equipment under 'qualified'.
Unit parking unsuitable for larger vehicles.
4 + 4 machines in Laundry. Large Book & DVD exchange.
Aircraft in/out Coolangatta very noisy.

The staff at this park are excellent. Our site was right on a corner a bit squishy and zero privacy. The power equipment start up around 8 - 8.30 the noise is annoying and we are on holidays  perhaps they could leave that till 10am.
Loved the dog run area, fantastic to make space for our dogs, especially as the road out of the park is a major road and very busy.
At night there was very little lighting on the streets of the park.

Enjoyed my stay.  Loved that I had my own ensuite with my caravan site.
Close to twin towns rsl club with courtesy bus picking us up and dropping us off.
The only downfall was the airport nearby but I soon overlooked that as everything else was excellent.
This place was perfect its location was great for the Tweed area and accomidation was fantastic but was at times noisey due to the planes taking off over the caravan park.
The villa was clean, spacious and nicely set up.The ladies in the office were lovely and very helpful. The park is well maintained. Will definitely being staying there again.
Only issue is the location right at the end of Coolangatta airport. Planes over head since I arrived.

De faciliteiten op het park waren echt perfect, kampeerkeuken was goed uitgerust, er was een grote koelkast, nette badkamers en een overdekte algemene ruimte. Voor de camping zelf had ik 5-sterren gegeven.

Helaas woonde 95% van de gasten vast op het park en bepaalde mensen creëerden een best wel onprettig en onveilige sfeer. De manager was heel vriendelijk totdat we een beroep deden op haar flexibiliteit, toen draaide ze naar een niet-empatisch persoon die erg chagrijnig was. Een gemiste kans, want met een vriendelijke uitleg hadden we haar punt prima begrepen, maar om direct zo onvriendelijk/onredelijk te worden zijn we niet gewend van de Australiërs.

Stayed in a budget cabin, cabin was neat and tidy, no complaints there. But we turned up after hours to 2 towels for a booking of 3 and had to wait until the morning at 8am for reception to open for another one. Then on the 2nd night we had run out of toilet paper, again after hours, as only 1 and a bit rolls were supplied for a 2 night stay for 3 people.  Lucky there was a servo just down the road open.
Just very inconvenient and not thought out well.

Ensuite powered sites are not as they are shown on their website.for the money they are charging ,what you get is very poor and not up to standard.They have a lot of permanents living there and they are very full of themselves and not very friendly.Cars seem to drive around the park at all times through the night and with no security gates you have no idea whether they are park customers or not.I have no intention of ever going there again

Deluxe cabin was clean, stylish and had everything in there.
Location was perfect, close to shops and straight on the M1 so easy to get to
Elephant in the room is the location of the airport... apart from that we had a pleasant stay.  Thsnks
This is a lovely place to stay for a relaxing holiday,, I have lived here now for 2 years,, the staff are just fantastic,, and very friendly and helpful.... 🙏 🙏 🙏 🙏 🙏 🙏 🙏

I was on a small camper van site but stayed 2 nights in a budget cabin. The camoing amenities are good and very clean. I also stayed two nights in a buget cabin. It had an external dedicated bathroom. It had all mod cons and everything was very clean.

Be aware the park is near the Gold Coast airport and on the flight path. However the planes stop overnight. You get used to it surprisingly quickly.

DO NOT STAY HERE. I have told everyone I know. This place is beyond unsafe .

This was, without a doubt, the worst experience I have ever had at any accommodation. The caravan park is run-down, chaotic, and feels more like a horror movie set than a holiday spot. I’m genuinely shocked that this place is still allowed to operate.

DO NOT bring your kids here. I cannot stress this enough — it is absolutely not a safe environment for children. There was no security, no rules enforced, and I witnessed countless instances where drugs, alcohol and domestic violence was involved.Management did NOTHING

And never, EVER come here alone. I felt deeply uncomfortable and on edge the entire time. There were people loitering around at all hours, shouting and slamming things in the night, and zero staff presence to deal with it. I didn’t feel protected for a single second — and if something were to go wrong, you’d be completely on your own.

The managers? Absolutely vile. Rude, aggressive, and completely uninterested in helping or resolving any issues. It was clear they just don’t care about guest safety or experience. Any concerns are brushed off or met with sarcasm and attitude! Very very sad and depressed people do not like their life or job.

Filthy bathrooms, overflowing bins, broken infrastructure — it’s like this place hasn’t been cleaned or maintained in years. The vibe was off from the moment I arrived, and I left early just to get away. I’ve never felt so relieved to leave a place in my life

Please, for your own safety and sanity — stay far, far away from this place. It’s not worth the risk.

Lovely cabin. Really nice and clean, got everything we need and good price, good location. Easy check in and out. Staffs are lovely and amenity are nice, swimming pool too cold for winter,enclosed dog park. will definitely be back on summer with our dog. Kid loved it when airplane fly over head.
We had a really lovely stay.
Thank you!

Pyramid Holiday Park is value for money and is approximately located about 4km from the Twin Towns Club and Coolangatta beach. The Caravan Park is directly under the flight path, and planes are flying between 6am and 10pm, but it didn't bother me. The Laundry and Camp Kitchen was well equipped. I would stay here again.
Pity about all the people smoking around us. Planes loud to start with but did not worry us. Got use to the plane noise quickly. All amenities where lovely. Staff in office great to deal with.
Lovely and clean
Overnight stay. I feel that there could be better lighting around the amenities. Amenities well maintained.

We love this place, its a lovely place to stay, the staff are beautiful and friendly, they accommodate for the services we need due to our time frames available each day after our bowling competitions, like the use of the laundry after hours by request and BBQ's for our larger group. We return every year without fail

This park obviously is well run and the facilities and caravan sites are top notch. The only downside is the plane noise especially in the evening's and early mornings. I would stay here again though.

We only stayed one night and in a basic cabin with separate ensuite. Was older butclean and equipped.
This suited our needs for an early flight the next day but I would definitely not choose to holiday there. It is directly on flight path and so noisy, we couldn’t sleep until flights finished around 10pm.
The park itself is very neat and tidy but with lots of permanents there it does not really have a holiday feel.

This is more of a caravan park than a holiday park, toilet&shower is seperate, not much to do with kids if it rains, wifi is rec room only!! pool closed, no playground, told not to play pool table with the little one incase he breaks a pool q, well then take a bond!!! really left us without much to do!! No mirrors in the rooms,   Bed was slanting downwards, I mean Besides the actual room being nice and clean, was not impressed and would have rather spent that money elsewhere!! Not that kid friendly!!

Staff are very helpful, professional and pleasant.
Main bedroom in deluxe cabin is very squishy.  Can’t put bedside table both sides.  Otherwise cabin was well equipped and comfortable.
A good caravan park that has looked after us for a few times now.  Easy to get around and clean.  Friendly and helpful staff.

85% people live in this caravan park
No playground
Old facility, need upgrade
Stayed in our caravan, great location and facilities clean. Access to amenities easy and staff friendly and knowledgeable about local attractions and walks! Thank you.
Excellent service by the lovely lady, Jo. She is very cooperative & polite to help during our stay. We had a great stay under their hospitality. Highly recommend for the stay 😊
So clean and the beds were so comfy. Easy check in and out

Fantastic stay for one night after a long drive and another long drive the next day. Seconds from the motorway. We felt safe. The lady on reception was lovely and the ensuite was a treat. Very easy to reverse our van. Many permanent residents that are friendly and welcoming.
Not a nice place at all. No genuine customer service. Just want your money & not care about your stay.
Good for overnight stopover. Aircraft activity is annoying due to being close to the airport.

Lovely and clean,  good linen . Beds comfortable
Amenities great.
Room and ensuite were clean and tidy.  Collecting and leaving room keys was convenient.  We only stayed overnight so cannot comment on amenities.
Great location, we had a caravan site and the ensuite was very clean.

I would not recommend at all.  Do not come here with kids. There is no security or gates and the park is in a very poor area so junkies are free to walk on in, which they do. Especially at night. Experienced this first hand.

Very, very disappointing management. A lot of questionable people in the park too. I saw and heard family violence too often. Was a horrible experience. Managers do nothing. Stay in the Gold-coast or Kingscliff do not stay here. Unsafe place.

This is my experience and opinion.

The deluxe cabin was absolutely immaculate. The room was spacious and beautiful and with internal bathroom and second bedroom . The kitchen was great and aircon fantastic . Very impressed and way better than most hotels . Will definitely be booking in again next time we are up
All good.

We came for 5 nights for Cooly Rocks On.
Two couples, towing 2 car trailers with cars.I was stressed about how all these vehicles would fit in this holiday park. Steve made it easy. Area to store trailers, undercover parking for our display vehicles and parking on site for our tow vehicles. Steve was very accomodating and made it so easy. The park was about 2km from Coolangatta. The park is spotless , with not a thing out of place. It has a pool, rec. room, small shop etc. I would definately stay here again 👍

Clean park and amenities. Would have been nice if the people staying next to us cleaned up after their cat. We were having to step around it's feaces to get into our car. Park needs to get some of the permanents to clean up their sites.
Great place. Beware located in flight path.

Cheerful check in process.  Option provided (and appreciated) for an early check in upon enquiry pre arrival.

Room presented as clean and fully prepared. External ensuite same.

Bed very comfortable.  Plenty of blankets.

Perhaps a quick airing / air freshener blast pre arrival for ensuite could be in order as it did smell a little musty.  Minor issue.

Bus service outside for an almost express route to Coolangatta.

Close proximity to Seagulls Leagues Club for an off site outing.

Easy and courteous check out process.
Great Cabin, Plenty of room. clean.  Great experience
The 2 bedroom deluxe cabin was very clean and well presented.  A short drive to shops and restaurants at Tweed Heads.

Pyramid Caravan Park,clean comfortable park.close to everything airport,shopping and good amenities for travellers.
Cabins are comfortable and great for families.
Only recommendation is to include an information sheet in each cabin for guests,as the Emergency plan although comprehensive is too small to read effectively for seniors and sight impaired.
A Park Map would be suitable.
Located close to M1. Great for overnight. Level sites. Great camp kitchen.
Really nice Park, clean and quiet, except for the aeroplanes,  but finish by 10pm and start at 6am. Enjoyed our stay. 🥰
We needed a half way break and this was it. Thank you so much.
Nice quiet park

A spacious and clean two bedroom cabin (two singles and a queen), comfortable bed (queen) used the other room for our luggage. The cabin was well maintained and modern. Staff were absolutely fantastic, they were enormously helpful and professional. Great kitchen fully kitted out with everything you could need including gas cooktop and full size oven. Enjoyed the red necked parrots enormously, even the Ibis were characters. Quiet from 9pm to 6am.
Very clean ensuite
Collette was so helpful, cabins were spotless and the location is handy to the M1.
We stayed for 3 nights and did not need service. They had complimentary items when we arrived but did not replenish.
Clean and tidy accommodation. Nice and quiet location. Would recommend it.
Was very well presented and found staff to be most helpful and caring.

Can only say good things. We were travelling with a 16 1/2  foot trailer and the staff allowed us to park it on the premises. I had asked before booking . Louise in reception was kind and informative. Room clean, tidy and had everything we needed. Thank you Team

Super helpful and friendly staff. Love having our own toilet and shower ensuite on  the caravan site , makes life sooooo much easier when giving our son with down syndrome showers. Definitely highly recommended this place.
Ideal accommodation

Beautiful cabin
Very clean
Lovely staff

Beautiful friendly place to stay
Excellent facilities
Quiet and neat and tidy
Friendly helpful staff
Will be definitely back again

Booked accomodation expecting to have wifi & a functioning aircon Unit in my Deluxe Villa as I came down for a work trip. The aircon doesn’t work & there’s no wifi in my “Deluxe Villa.” Which I solely booked this place for.

They also offer no refund apparently after check in for any reason…. Which is wilddd for 2025.

Bitterly disappointed with money down the drain.

Just stopped for an overnighter in a 2 bed villa. Extremely comfortable bed and pillows. Cabin was clean and had everything we needed. Great proximity to Gold Coast Airport, which we needed. This does mean you're in the flight path, but no plane's overnight and they don't start too early. 8 mins to the local Coles and Woolies, cafes, restaurants and fast food near by as well. Not far from the beach and the river and just off the motorway for easy access north and south. Friendly, helpful staff. Very affordable for the night given it was school holidays, the start of Easter week and the proximity to everything. Thanks team for all your work.

Stayed for 6 nights in a very clean and comfortable deluxe cabin. The staff were very friendly and helpful. It is one of the best kept caravan parks I have stayed in and will definitely stay there again if I am in the area.

I stayed here for 10 nights during the Australian Surf Lifesaving Championships. We had a 2 bed deluxe cabin and found it spacious,  bright and well appointed. The park was clean and quiet and the staff were incredibly helpful. It is close to the bus stop if you need public transport to Kirra Beach and close to the airport.
Rooms were well cared for and presented, facilities were clean and well maintained. Location was good for North Kirra surf carnival and ideal for a group booking. Thanks Pyramid!
Great little park with easy access to the M1. Well maintained grounds, spotless facilities and a spacious site for our caravan, we were even able to stay hitched up for our overnight stay.

can't comment on rooms as we had a powered site with an ensuite, have been going there for years and was a little surprised with how full / busy the park has become with what looks like relocated permanents in caravans, doesn't look like a tourist park of the past, looks a bit untidy compared with other parks we had stayed at during this trip

Lovely older park but very clean. Ensuite sites, not many though due to long term residents here . We love here, nice and quiet with the odd aircraft taking off and landing. The only negative which we get in all parks is the constant speeding through the park. 5 stars regardless.

Whilst the accommodation was clean it was a shock to the system to find that we were directly under the flight path for the Gold Coast airport with the plane's literally a few meters above  the roof line!!  We were originally booked for the weekend when the cyclone hit but were initially told t's and c's apply, no rebooking! Eventually they had to offer a credit to us.  When we rebooked they charged extra on top of the original price.  Still not quite sure why we should have had to pay extra when none of what happened was our fault.  I would have to say that I wasn't impressed with the attitude from staff during the rebooking process or when trying to get the credit issued.

Overall summary : it's a nice clean well kept holiday park.
A credit to the staff, mostly.
Our choice was a budget cabin no. 83, with it's private outside bathroom shower toilet block.
Cabin was very clean and double bed was quite comfortable.
Bed linen impeccably fresh and clean.
Outside shower unit is a let down, with some previous tenants long hairs embedded on tiled floor.
Spider webs across corners of brickwork.
Toilet paper holder rod detaches when tearing paper.

Cabin sliding doors can be difficult to close properly and lock properly likely due to wear and tear.
We enjoyed our stay and would recommend the Pyramid Holiday Park as a safe friendly environment to stay.

This was the 3rd stay in recent weeks and their service is excellent.  The ladies in the office are a pleasure to deal with, always friendly polite and helpful.  The other staff in the park are always polite and friendly.  We stayed in our van on an ensuite site.  Plenty of room and bathroom very clean. They also have a storage facility which we used whilst on a cruise. They even moved our van during Cyclone Alfred to avoid damage.  We are so grateful. The only thing to get used to is aircraft noise as you are near Gold Coadt Airport but you get used to it
We will return

Perfect location
Cabins are roomy, clean and in excellent condition
Beds are comfortable
Only issue is lack of internet in the rooms
Definitely will stay there again
Great staff extremely helpfull clean could not ask for better place 150%recommended.

A good, clean park to stay and the pool and grounds are well looked after.
There were quite a few long term residents there, so if it's a holiday crowd you're after it isn't the place for you.
Value for money wise, at $55 per night it was good value for a weekend on a powered site.
Great little park, good facilities enjoyed our time there with a large group of friends
We checked in and then after seeing our site decided we would leave. Not the usual standard we have had at GDay. A lot of long term residents. Outlook from our camp-site was the toilets.

Due to cyclone Alfred this property would not refund my money.  Pyramid Holiday Park were in the flood and evacuation zone according to government websites.
I’m extremely disappointed with their poor customer service and outright refusal to refund my payment for the week’s accommodation.  I would NOT recommend or make a booking here again.

This place was subject to evacuation orders, so it would not have been possible for anyone to stay here these orders would have prevented anyone to stay here.  This parked was given 72hrs notice with the unfortunate result in having to cancel the trip.  They have still not provided the T&C’s for the events of a natural disaster occurring.  So they were given suitable notice of the cancellation of the accommodation which was not my fault.

Would like to thank everyone that works at the park we were there through the cyclone and the park made sure myself and all the other guests and residents were ok highly recommend these guys. Thanks Justin and Narelle

Great place, clean, spacious, great rooms, deep pool.

Well placed in proximity to Highway.
You cannot beat this place if you like planes.

The lady who checked me in was so lovely & accommodating. I arrived nearly one hour after closing due to my mix up in time (QLD/NSW) & she still went out of her way to book me in. My cabin was the cleanest cabin/accommodation I’ve ever stayed in. Bathroom was spotless & smelled clean & the bed linen was clean that smelled of softener. Honestly could not fault.
The ensuite was a great find to store things out of the weather
Lovely clean cabIn very quiet
Excellent cabin, very modern, clean & comfy.  Great bed, milk in the fridge, toiletries everywhere!  Would definitely stay again!
Units are clean and well maintained, facilities are great and location is so close to Coolangatta. Loved it
Was able to book cabin the same day and easy after hours pick up for the keys was provided. Good communication. Friendly service.

Great budget old school holiday park with lots of different value options. I stayed in a deluxe budget cabin it was super clean and very well kept. Has car port ceiling fans and air con.
The pool is lovely. Lots of sun lounges and toilets. Big rec room. Okay BBQ facility. Right under the flight path from the airport. Walking distance to service station. No WiFi in the cabins or park only available at reception.
Very clean cabin.  Friendly people.  Handy to hospital which was the reason for my stay.

Our three day stay in a budgey cabin with our dog was lovely. Cabin was comfortable and very clean. We had private outdoor bathroom which was also very clean. Park is well kept. Some low lifes can run around in park at night so keeping cabin locked is a must.
We have been enjoying our time good fun and very affordable! Thank you.

We had an awesome stay at Pyramid Holiday Park. We were greeted by a lovely Collette at reception who was very informative about everything we needed to know. Our cabin was quiet, clean, with more than enough space. The bathroom was outdoors (about 5 metres away from the room entrance) yet still convenient to access. Thanks for the stay, we will be back!

Nelson

We really enjoyed our stay in the deluxe 2 bedroom cabin.
It was the cleanest, well presented cabin we have ever stayed in. Very large space with everything you could need to be comfortable.
Amenities are fantastic.
Perfect crystal clear pool and lush gardens throughout the grounds.
The whole team were lovely and very helpful
Great location, close to everything.
Our kids loved being able to see the airplanes. We don't get to see them where we live so it was a pretty cool sight for us.
Thank you for having us.
Would definately recomend 👌
We will definately be staying again in the future.
loved this place very clean and handy to all and so peaceful and relaxing i would book  here again

So, I recently stayed at the Pyramid Holiday Park.
Park is very clean and tidy. The pool was  very clean. Kids loved it.. Where we were situated was very helpful with the kids.
One thing I will say was not very pleasant was the ensuite we had got smelt like wet dog. The curtain had stains on it. The window had black mould on it. I did ask for a new bath curtain, and I did receive another one. I end up spraying stuff for the smell to not be as bad.
Close to IGA, a servo. Cloths lines were great. Kids Park was not too good as the plastic was broken for climbing frames.
The planes that fly over are extremely loud. The laundry matt was very clean and massive.
Beautiful, grassy sites with concrete slabs for the awning area.  Amenities very clean.  Office staff amazing and ben over backwards to assist.

Deluxe 2bm cabin, excellent value and clean comfortable, easy access, easy location, close to airport etc, great for early morning take offs. Everything supplied, wonderful thank you.
Will be returning, perfect accom to visit family close by.

Well looked after park, cabin was very clean and comfortable.
Great location.
Bit of flight noice.

Very nice park, hired a cabin for a few days which was spotless and clean. Was self contained and perfectly suited to our needs. Well priced and a nice park to relax in.
Is very close to plenty of supermarkets and service stations just down the road.
Highly recommend to stay at if your travelling in this area.
Will be booking again down the track.

For a holiday park it is not very kid friendly with kids being stopped from having fun in the evening (8-9am) even though there were up to 9 aircraft landing afterwards and adults allowed to use the facilities late into the night. There was staff verbally abusing kids in the pool without giving them an opportunity to get parents and physically assaulting kids in the park. I don’t think we will be going here again.

Ensuite site. Ensuite great. Asked for a late check out iaw G'day parks privelidge. Emphatically denied. Site next to workshop and bins. Almost every morning (7am ish) there was a truck collecting trash or groundsman opening roller doors. On a positive note, it's a great location for plane spotting, because they go 300m over the park every 10 min. Hold your conversation or phone call for 30 sec everytime one takes off, or lands. We left at early, so we could have a sleep in.

The park is nice, staff were nice (especially the cleaners). Bins around the park seemed to be emptied daily which was amazing over Xmas. Park has a playground and pool, only down fall for the pool was the shade cover only covers the stairs. The pool area also has an bbq which we used a lot during our stay, it was always clean and easy to use. Our room was good. We were close to beaches, shops etc. The park did have planes flying over but we only really heard them when in the pool, when we were inside our cabin with the tv and aircon on we never heard them so they weren’t a problem for us.
Thank you for an excellent stay as always.  Your reception staff are exceptionally friendly and very accommodating.  See you again soon 🙌🥰♥️
Only stayed a few nights in a cabin but couldn't fault anything. Nice and quiet maybe I was lucky? Very friendly staff.

Lovely park, large site,  alot of permanents.
Reasonably  close to necessities. Too close to airport, directly under flight path. Would have been nice to be informed of this.
Amenities modern & clean.
The ensuite sites are great!

The cleanest and friendliest park we have stayed at in a long time. It is however located under a flight path. Close enough that you have to pause your conversation as the planes pass over. The pool didn’t have Andy shade cover unless you were in the shallow end and the kids could only play with the ball out the front near the road. We were unable to bring the dog as we have a large van.  The streets are tight for a larger van (21ft) and the permanents don’t like you being “ in their  space”.
Great new bungalows that are neat and tidy

We had an excellent stay at Pyramid Holiday Park for nearly 3 months, as we were in between sales of our home. Louise and Colette went out of their way to accomodate our needs. They are professional and friendly. All of the management team are excellent. Our 2 bedroom deluxe villa was perfect for our stay. Clean, safe and cosy.  A good and fully equipped kitchen,  and we loved the gas stove tops. Ceiling fans in all rooms was superb, and of course AC in lounge. Small suggestions of a hanging rack in the twin bed room for clothes. This holiday park is run exceptionally well. It was very peaceful, and only a 5 minute drive to Kirra and Coolangatta. The swimming pool was very clean, and the park had great cooking facilities and a dining area, for those  needing  them. Very dog friendly too. Thank you once again for  looking after us.
Nice clean park, friendly and helpful staff. Only drawback is you are under the flight path. If you are out all day then its not too much of an issue.

Loved staying at this place. The team were very friendly and even assisted me with moving my camper trailer into the correct position. When it rained part of the trailers front shade area came down and they called to tell me so that my stuff wouldn't get wet.

The pool was at a wonderful temperature and personal sites toilet/ shower are a great size.
Every time I stay the service is first class, there girls on reception go above and beyond to help.

Very Friendly staff, extremely helpful with booking and settling us in. Fantastic knowledge about the local sites to see. The planes are not that bad (our favourite part). Comfortable and safe with lovely clean amenities! Well done to everyone involved and Thankyou for having us 🥰🥰

Very neat and clean facilities, very well presented park. The budget cabin we stayed in although quite old was very well maintained and clean. The external private ensuite was a plus.
All park amenities are well presented and kept impeccably tidy.

Will definitely use again when in the area.

Cash is welcomed and offers better rates than online booking sites.
Great place to stay for a few days very handy location and nice and quiet spot.
Very clean cabin. Lots of plates, pots, frying pans. Very happy 😁 spotlessly clean. Beautiful bed. Friendly, helpful lady at reception
Could not fault a thing , we had the best time. Thank you
Very clean facility and helpful staff. We would stay there again.
Excellent accessibility, thank you for making our visit so easy!

The site was quite tight reversing into it. My van was less than 500mm from the tree at the back. It was very close to neighbours on two side. Their smoke was noticeable in my van which meant keeping it closed up. The ensuite was old but adequate. The Hot water temp varied through a short shower. The camp kitchen was well set up, as was the laundry.
Oh, it lies directly under the flight path for the Gold Coast airport…a little noisy.
For 3 out of the 4 days I was there, work trucks were parked up in the exit driveway which made it a narrow exit…I hit my mirrors on the hedge on more than one occasion…they were quite inconveniently located.
nice pool
Great

Cabin was spotlessly clean bed very comfortable. Located close to function we were attending. Office staff very obliging with when we could go into room. The only thing missing was some dish washing liquid and tea towel .
Great Place to stay!
I was so happy park was easy to find room and bathroom facilities were clean and next to cabin ! It had everything that I needed ! So happy with my stay Wendy xx

Loved our very private caravan site, early morning cleaners were always happy to allow us to use the facilities even though they were hard at work. Lovely clean camp kitchen with big screen TV,  very happy to be able to watch the MotoGP.
Convenient, easy access and great amenities. Staff friendly and helpful
Cabin was extremely clean,Staff were friendly and helpful we would definitely stay here again
Great place to stay - keep in mind that this is located close to an airport so pretty loud with the planes going overhead, otherwise, can’t fault this place
We had an ensuite site for 3 nights and were very pleased with the holiday parks facilities and the friendly staff that were a pleasure to speak with. Highly recommend Pyramid Holiday Park.

Recently stayed for 2 nights.
Perfect rooms and clean toilets
Near Gold Coast airport
I really loved the stay

It was a fantastic stay! We booked a deluxe villa that was clean and ideally situated across from the pool where the kids enjoyed spending time. BBQ facilities are great, the lorikeet feeding was a highlight for the kids. Only 5mins away from the awesome family friendly Coolangata beach. Yes there are planes from time to time flying over but we were aware of that and we got used to it pretty quickly. Would definitely come back, we had a blast! ✨️

Was ok my room supposedly had a bath that's why I booked it. Arrived no bath partner not happy was the only reason we booked here. Was told something would be done eg maybe compo who knows. Checked out got attitude from the female manager. Male was fine when he came to discuss the issue.

I would say this park is more of a residential park than a holiday park. When using the camp kitchen I had to squeeze in. The people who were cooking took over the whole place.  I thought they were cooking for the whole park. But no it was just 2 families.  Showers and toilets were clean. The shower were disappointing. There was no pressure. The park was right under the flight path too.  So if you're a plane watcher you would love it.  Would I stay again no. Much nicer and newer parks in the area to stay in.

Needed to cancel due to a medical emergency in my family but they insisted that refunds could not be issued for ANY reason within 7 days before. This is the first time I have had a medical reason for refunds be denied. Hope they enjoy stealing my money like a bunch of snakes. And to the owner reading this comment, why would I cancel with no refund just so you can earn more money.

The location is so confident straight off the highway yes there ate planes but they weren’t a bother time us. The cabin (2 bedroom deluxe villa) was a great size and had everything you needed. I would focus on more deep cleaning like dusting under the beds and the sliding door glass. The staff were very friendly at check in and check out. We would definitely stay again
Reception was amazing finding us somewhere else to stay, seeing they didn't have anything for the nights we were there.... thank you
Peaceful , friendly and relaxed , we keep coming back ...the planes are an experience but one gets used to them ..!!

Average , they were to be expected for a holiday park I guess, not overly friendly though and not overly unfriendly either, they didn’t like me mentioning to them a great pool cleaning company after I noticed the green build up in their pool

The Pyramid Holiday Park was a great place to stay as a stopover before getting a very early morning flight the next day. The campground was clean and tidy, and our room was spacious and accommodated our family group comfortably. The staff were very friendly and helpful.  I really appreciated that they booked a reliable taxi service for us, for our very early morning departure. We would happily stay again.
Rooms are very conservative with no space and WiFi.
Right under the flight path, planes every 5 minutes from 6am til 11pm

Very disappointed with this site.|Especially as it is a G’Day Park.|Took an en-suite site, which appears to be the preponderance of available sites, as most are taken by long term vans, some looking like they have not left the site for many years.|Didn’t look like the one in the photo.|||Positive point, the en-suite was relatively clean, the water was hot and plentiful.|After that the plus points go downhill at an alarming rate.|Our site was rough, the actual site being rutted and uneven.|We did not connect the water as the water point and surrounding drain etc looked somewhat unhygienic.|So, we just used the power point.||WiFi, was available, as long as you could park your van within a few metres of the reception area.|Outside of this, forget WiFi!|Surrounding sites had a variety of canine audience, most of which would not be Cruft’s material.|All seemed very friendly though.|When checking in we noted that we could read the writing on the |tyres of the aircraft on approach to Coolangatta airport.|“ It’s OK, the receptionist smilingly advised, they stop at 10:00 pm”.|Didn’t bother to ask what time they began in the morning!|Turns out it’s 6:00 am!|Our travelling companions in another van arrived just prior to us.|They were advised that they had an ensuite site.|Pointing out that they did not need, and had not booked an en-suite site the receptionist advised, in no uncertain manner, that they must have only had en-suite sites available when they booked.|This was not pointed out, at the time of booking and more to the point they were not given their G’Day Parks discount.|Didn’t check out the Camp Kitchen or the rest of the site.|Locked the van, went for dinner outside and headed out of town just after the planes started landing.|Do not recommend, unless you are really stuck for somewhere in Tweed Heads.|Rates as well below standard, best to be avoided.
Due to the many permanents and the close proximity to the airport, our stay was not as pleasant as we hoped.

Limped into the park with busted suspension on our camper trailer, Steve and a couple of the big lads helped us out to fix the problem and we left on schedule the next day. Legends! Busy park with smallish sites but ensuites are good. close to the beach and for plane watching! Staff awesome.

11 of us spent two nights here in 4 of their budget cabins, had a great time. Great staff, friendly people and perfect location, close to everything in the Twin City's. Would highly recommend, looking forward to visiting again.

Last minute 1 night trip/stay & Collette was a pleasure to deal with over the phone.
I wanted to keep a car and trailer out of sight and safe so she was very accommodating with achieving that request.
The guy who met me at the gate late and helped thank you.
The 2 bedroom villa was so clean and bed was very comfortable.The actual park is really well maintained and for some reason not what I expected. I actually thought the 2 planes I heard were pretty cool. Don’t hear them around my place. I think my grandkids would get a kick out of them.
Will definitely stay here next trip.
Thanks again. J.
Great caravan park.  Very popular and clean.  Can't wait to return
Just the company love u all. Constant aeroplanes bit of a bummer bur pretty impressive all the same
Lovely place to stay.
On  plane flight path on busy road. Deluxe villa very comfortable.  Manager very kindly held our funds as a credit to use on this stay. Cabin very clean.appropriate utensils.

Noise. On busy Kennedy Drive. At Southern end of aircraft run way. As others have commented. Planes from 6am till about 9pm...few 30 minute quiet times. Cabins squashed in together. Our villa did not have car port as in park photos (75). Lesson is to appreciate negatives of paying less than alternatives that are quieter more " spacious". Just check north/ south flight path and avoid those properties. Flight path minimally over northern end of Coolangatta beach..

A very nice park in a very convenient location just moments off the M1/A1 highway and not too far from some great surf beaches. Please note that this park is located very near the Gold Coast Airport so you will experience jet noise of takeoffs and landings from early morning until late evening.
Some sites for bigger vans tight didn't know under flight path for airport
There was a Karen at the front desk who was unnecessarily rude when I asked a polite question. There is also no wifi and the fans in the rooms were broken. Not a great stay.

Where do l start. Airconditner a waste of time, does not work . Facilities are on the wrong side of the building.
No TV  unless you bring your own internet.
Cabins have small beds and are over priced. No mention of being directly under the take-off route for the airport.
Good accomodation

We’ve been staying with our huge setup from the beginning of February, and it’s only been easy and pleasurable the entire time. Such a well maintained and cared for park, great facilities and the friendliest staff! We look forward to visiting again.
Lots of planes...lol
Nice

Very helpful, polite and friendly staff
...
Amenities are spotless and clean.
Highly recommend.
And love the dogo park for my pooch...

Unfortunately, my sister's recent stay at Pyramid was very negative. A faulty door led to her breaking her finger. While she informed management, they didn't apologise for the incident, investigate the door issue, or offer any assistance (other than calling an ambulance) despite the severity of the injury. We hope they will take steps to address the damaged door and improve guest safety protocols to prevent similar incidents in the future.
Cancelled stay before booking started. Guest is in late 70’s and accompanying carers have Covid. Refused to refund or credit. What a ripoff!

With great anticipation we booked an ensuite powered caravan site and a 1br cabin to spend Christmas together as a family for a week, from this Saturday

Yesterday our family came down with COVID. My wife is quite unwell and with a vulnerable elderly grandmother and young children in the family group, that has absolutely ruined our Christmas plans.

We contacted the park and sought NOT a refund, but a credit, so that we could all try to reconvene at another time and still make something out of the money we had spent.

With approximately $1400 invested in this holiday and given the unforeseen circumstances, we were confident that we could salvage something but NO, we have been flatly advised that there will be no credit and no support or assistance of any kind.

It defies belief that given the demand at this time of year that the park would not be able to resell the accommodation.

The response from Louise in particular was devoid of any care or concern about our situation and she basically indicated it was our problem and we were welcome to come, despite clearly being a health risk to other campers.

It goes without saying that we will never book a holiday in this place again and if you are considering booking here, look for alternatives, they have zero care factor.
Excellent

I stayed in a fully self contained cabin.  There was an adjacent private toilet and bathroom.  Although separate to the actual cabin, it was for my own private use.  The cabin had a double bed and two bunks.  There was a very functional kitchen with a table.  There was no wifi in the cabin but it could be accessed in the recreation room which had a large TV and a supply of books, CDs etc.  Located close to shops.

One thing of concern was the regular low flying aircraft coming in for a landing at Coolangatta.  In saying that, I got used to it quite quickly.

Well priced at $110 per night.

I loved the lemon scented towels!
The bathrooms are outside they forget to give you a code so you can get in so we had to wait for somebody to let us in so we can go to the bathroom very unorganized

Pros: rooms are clean & comfortable.

Cons: VERY noisy with planes, cabin toilets are outside (very inconvenient at night) TV was on a cupboard & couldn't be watched from the bed.

Had a last minute stay here.
Booked in person at the location and they couldn't be nicer or more helpful.
Giving advice on essential info but also seeing I was burned out and just wanted to sleep so didn't try to overload me with info.
Room was cleaned beyond a fault
This place is great local to everything.
Nice place to camp , friendly staff , nice amenities,  clean .. 👌

We weren’t informed of being directly under the flight path of the Gold Coast Airport! Planes 12hrs a day flying very low as they’re landing & taking off. Sometimes every 10 minutes!
If you need a quiet break/holiday, don’t stay here!!

We stayed in a deluxe family cabin. Could not fault it. Almost brand new. Had everything we needed. Very comfortable. The grounds are well kept and the park is very quiet.

The park seems to be mainly permanent residents, with a smattering of options for the travelling public. The locals were nice and welcoming.

It was an educational experience... We learnt that Coolangatta airport has a curfew between 11pm and 6am. So no need for an alarm clock. I'm now on a first name basis with all of the pilots. The planes are that low, you can read their name badges 😂
Stayed a couple of nights here.  The cabin was clean and had cooking utensils if you wanted to cook. It was near to cafes, restaurant or takeaways.

Nice, lots of friendly oldies living here. Clean amenities. Close to the airport-awesome if you love watching planes, which we do! Very friendly staff. Very unfriendly kids that live here, picking on kids smaller than them. Avoid if you want to keep your kids safe.
Good grounds

After booking a Sunday lunch in nearby Carool, we needed a place to stay overnight and, through random online browsing for affordable options, found Pyramid Holiday Park.

From the get-go, the service was excellent. I received regular comms via both email and text, and had absolutely no questions or concerns by the time we arrived. Even getting there after-hours, the collection box was clearly marked and I was armed with the PIN code. Along with the key was a map which, yet again, made for an easy and confusion-free check-in.

The cabin itself, being the basic, no-frills selection (and thus very inexpensive), met all our needs. It was clean, well-presented, and contained all you'd expect (fridge, TV, air con, microwave, kitchen supplies, wardrobe, etc.) Best of all, the fact it includes both a comfortable double bed and a bunk bed, makes this a really affordable and sensible holiday option for families.

A condition of taking the budget cabin was the use of an external amenities block. Rest assured it's exclusively assigned to you, and is not communal in any way. It simply means walking 5 metres from your front door to the bathroom door. The amenities were again clean and tidy, and the generic shower head still pumped out a strong blast of invigorating hot water.

As you're in a holiday park, it's needless to say you will encounter some noise from passing vehicles, neighbours, kids playing, and the like. For us, there wasn't a moment that it became intrusive or annoying. It was all in the background. Even the planes, from the nearby airport, truly weren't an issue. You experience a few seconds of loud drone as they pass overhead, but it passes really quickly. Staying on the side of a main road or train line is, in my opinion, considerably more impactful.

I must add that the park's location is great. You're only minutes in the car to the nearest beaches, and there's local shops and entertainment aplenty. You're even closer to the local waterways if you're a keen fisherman or boatie.

In summary, Pyramid Holiday Park was everything we'd hoped for. Inexpensive, clean & tidy, convenient location, and great service. Much appreciated.

We stayed last weekend for my brothers wedding, had everything we needed, clean, quiet, beautiful staff (especially the one at the front desk!). Close to Tweed town centre. Oh, and we also LOVED the planes flying over us, the kids thought they were the best!
Stayed for 1 night in a budget cabin, it did the job & it was close to airport which was the main objective when booking the accommodation. The facilities were clean & tidy.

Stayed for just one night on an unpowered site. Personally think the whole amenities block needs revamping as it was pretty gross. No soap in the kitchen, no oven to cook any food which we found very strange as surely a “kitchen” includes an oven. Had to buy takeout as a result. Wouldn’t stay again.
Not long arrived, but it is a great place to stay with local eating and recreation places. Very quiet 🤫
